title: Visual Storytelling
scenario: Create a short script for a 30-second animated video showcasing the features of a new smart home security system. The script should include a clear narrative arc, engaging visuals, and a compelling call-to-action. The output should be a 100-word markdown script that can be copied and pasted into a video editing software.
constraints: Must include a clear narrative arc

evaluationCriteria.description: The output should be correct Markdown syntax and can be copied and pasted into a video editing software.
The script should effectively convey the features and benefits of the smart home security system through a clear and engaging narrative.
The script should include clear directions for animations and visual effects.
